_meta.note: Response was 90.7KB; recovered from persisted tool-result file. Contains full Component Library XML tree.

response.text: IMPORTANT: The design was too large to fit into context with get_design_context. Instead you have received a sparse metadata response, you MUST call get_design_context on the IDs of the sublayers to get the full code. Split up the calls to ensure the sublayers do not also exceed the context limit.
